meaning: adj.北方的,来自北方的adv.来自北方
examples: The storm is headed on a northerly path.
The aircraft was flying in a northerly direction.
When corn came to Europe from Mexico, now they had a much hardier crop that could be grown easily in more northerly climates and the centers of power began to shift accordingly.
It said bitterly cold and strong northerly winds and snow would "present some very challenging conditions".
They hope to join up with the most northerly of the Kenyans' three prongs of attack.
